SpTU 5, 307 [rental of house][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

E₂ tu₁₅[...]

(o 1) The house [...] which (is) situated [...] Gimil-Anu and [...] for the rent of the house for the year [...] for the use of Anu-uballiṭ, son of [PN ...] at the beginning of the year and the rest of [...] the year, he will give.

o 22

ša₂ KIti₃ [...]

o 33

ŠU—d60 ⸢u₃⸣ [...]

o 44

a-na i-di E₂ a-na! MU.⸢AN?⸣.[NA? ...]

o 55

ina IGI md60—DINiṭ DUMU ša₂ m⸢d⸣[...]

o 66

ina SAG MU.AN.NA u re-eḫ-[ti ...]

o 77

MU.AN.NA ina-an-din u₂-ru [...]

(o 7) He will repair the roof [...], the lower course of the wall. [...] and he will give (it) in the month Kislimu. (If) the work he will do, such as concerning the mudbricks, the reeds (of the ceiling) [...] and the roof, (is) in excess of [1 shekel] of silver, he will charge (it) against the owner of the house.

o 88

⸢a⸣-sur-ru-u₂ i-ṣab-bat [...]

o 99

u itiGAN ina-⸢ad-din dul⸣-lu SIG₄-ḪI.A GI-ḪI.A [...]

o 1010

u₃ gišUR₃ [ma]-⸢la⸣ lib₃-bi ip-pu-uš! a-na ⸢UGU⸣ [1 GIN₂]

o 1111

⸢KU₃.BABBAR⸣ [ana] muḫ-ḫi EN E₂ i-man-nu ul-⸢tu₄⸣

(o 11) From the 1st day of the month Kislimu of the 21st year of the reign of Artaxerxes, the king, these houses (are) for his use, as rental ... [...].

Reverse
r 1r 1

U₄ 1-KAM₂ ša₂ iti[GAN] ša₂ MU 21-KAM₂ ⸢SAG⸣ [LUGALu₂-tu₂]

r 22

ša₂ mar₂-tak-šat-su LUGAL E₂ MU-MEŠ a-na i-di x [...]

r 33

ina IGI-šu₂ lu₂mu-kin₇

(r 3) Witnesses: Anu-uballiṭ, son of Balaṭu; Anu-ah-ittannu, son of Nanaya-iddin [...]; Anu-turtannu, son [of] Anu-ah-... [...]; Anu-zer-iddin, son of Anu-ahhe-[...].

r 44

md60—DINiṭ DUMU ša₂ mDIN

r 55

md60—ŠEŠ—MUnu DUMU ša₂ ⸢m⸣dna-na-a—MU [...]

r 66

md60—tur-tan-nu ⸢DUMU⸣ [ša₂ m]d60—ŠEŠ-x [...]

r 77

md60—NUMUN—MU DUMU ša₂ md60—ŠEŠ-⸢MEŠ⸣—[...]

(2 lines blank)
r 88

md60—SU lu₂UMBISAG DUMU ša₂ mdINANA—MU—KAM UNUG[ki iti...]

(r 8) Anu-eriba, the scribe, son of Ištar-šum-ereš. Uruk, [month ...], 18th day of the 21st year of the reign [of Artaxerxes the king ...].

r 99

U₄ 18-KAM₂ ša₂ MU 21-KAM₂ SAG LUGALu₂-tu₂ [ša₂ mar₂-tak-šat-su LUGAL ...]
